notes:
v1.1.0 Update
✨ Circuit Maze: New Glitch Scanner puzzle type. Players navigate a procedural circuit-board maze with WASD or arrow keys, dodging blinking lightning hazards (reset on contact), slowdown hazards (half speed), and speed boosts (double speed). Each maze can include 0-2 key/lock pairs that gate progress. Five security levels scale the grid from 5x5 to 9x9. Time limit is configurable, defaulting to 30 seconds.
✨ Matches the Circuit Maze game added in Unboxing the Mystery v1.4.0, so the same maze experience can show up on both the smartphone scanner and Unboxing tiles.
💛 Originally commissioned by riffin, who chose to share it with every patron. Thanks, riffin!

announcement.title: 🧩 Scanner App v1.1.0
announcement.content:
Smartphone - Scanner Apps v1.1.0 is ready.

  • Circuit Maze: New Glitch Scanner puzzle type. WASD or arrow keys, hazards, key/lock paths, and five security levels. Time limit is configurable, defaulting to 30 seconds.
  • Cross-Module: Matches the Circuit Maze game added in Unboxing the Mystery v1.4.0 - the same maze experience shows up on both the smartphone scanner and Unboxing tiles.
  • Credit: Originally commissioned by riffin, who chose to share it with every patron. Thanks, riffin!
